svg.title: Product operations platform architecture
svg.desc: Five-layer architecture: ingestion, storage, AI pipeline, integrations, and frontend dashboard

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Tell me more about feedback ingestion options')
sendPrompt('How do I set up Slack ingestion?')
sendPrompt('How do I ingest from GitHub issues?')
sendPrompt('How do I add more ingestion sources later?')
sendPrompt('Tell me more about using Supabase for this project')
sendPrompt('What is pgvector and how does it help clustering?')

svg.text: FastAPI backend — each step is an independent module

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does AI clustering of feedback work?')

sendPrompt('How does AI break stories into technical tasks?')
sendPrompt('Why is a human review gate important here?')
g.text: Approve / edit before tickets are created

g.text: Pipeline visualizer · review UI · ticket status · analytics
